prompt: Create a square 1:1 anime-style sticker illustration on a clean white background. On the left, draw a cute young chibi anime girl from the waist up with very long flowing pale icy blue hair, a small ahoge loop on top, soft black sketch outlines, glossy highlights, and a white short-sleeve blouse with a pale pink skirt or apron. Her face is intentionally obscured by a large centered opaque square censor block in a light gray-to-blue gradient, covering most of the head and upper torso. Add three bright red comic emphasis strokes to the upper left of her head. On the right side, place large bubbly Japanese sticker lettering in a vertical playful layout with thick dark navy outlines and soft highlights: exactly 3 main text groups reading てみ in cyan, そその in pink, and メイド in large pink characters stacked downward. Include exactly 2 small orange plus signs, one near the upper right of the cyan text and one near the lower right of the bottom text. Add a small brown oval accent on the lower pink character. Keep the composition bright, messy-cute, hand-drawn, slightly imperfect, like a low-quality AI-generated anime sticker, with bold outlines, pastel colors, and no extra background details.
